name: MitoQ vascular oxidative-stress trial is completed without posted results
summary: Completed no-results MitoQ registry in a vascular oxidative-stress and vascular-health context.
statement: ClinicalTrials.gov lists NCT05561556 as completed with 31 actual participants and no posted results in the June 8, 2026 API view.
population_or_model: Adults in a vascular oxidative-stress and vascular-health study
quantitative_note: Registry enrollment is 31; result status is not posted.
caveats: Registry status and design do not provide evidence of benefit.
Any future result should be reviewed before changing the outlook.
No-results status is useful watchlist context, not efficacy evidence.
